title: croton cerinus var. linifolius
intro: Croton cerinus var. linifolius, also known as Croton cerinus or Ashoka, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is an evergreen shrub native to tropical regions, recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including treating menstrual disorders, reducing inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Croton cerinus var. linifolius include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual use.
